data.title: Tether's Q1 profit hits $1.04B with Treasury holdings at $141B, as stablecoin uptake grows in emerging markets.
data.description: The leading stablecoin issuer maintains a heavily concentrated balance sheet in US Treasuries, with stablecoin usage growing in emerging markets.

data.title: Vanda Pharmaceuticals Announces U.S. Commercial Availability of NEREUS™ (tradipitant), the First New Pharmacologic Treatment for People with Motion Sickness in More Than 40 Years
data.description: NEREUS™, a product by Vanda Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: VNDA), can now be purchased directly through the website nereus.us. As of May 1, 2026, the company has made NEREUS™ (tradipitant) available for consumers nationwide in the United States. This product is specifically designed to prevent vomiting caused by various factors.

data.title: Natuzzi Filed Form 12B-25 for Late Filing of Form 20-F
data.description: In Bari, Italy, specifically in Santeramo in Colle, a company by the name of Natuzzi has recently submitted a Form 12B-25 due to a delay in filing their Form 20-F. This event reflects a procedural issue impacting the company's financial reporting, marking a significant development for Natuzzi and its stakeholders.

data.title: Stifel Declares Quarterly Common Stock Cash Dividend and Declares Preferred Stock Cash Dividend
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Stifel Financial Corp. (NYSE: SF) declared a cash dividend of $0.34 per share for its common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on June 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 1, 2026. The announcement was made by the company's Board of Directors in St. Louis.

data.title: ORIC Pharmaceuticals Reports Inducement Grants under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In South San Francisco, California and San Diego, a clinical stage oncology company, ORIC Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ORIC), disclosed that on May 1, 2026, they awarded a combined 216,000 non-qualified stock options and 35,000 restricted stock units to four recently hired non-executive staff who joined the company in April 2026. This move is part of ORIC's focus on developing treatments addressing mechanisms of therapeutic resistance.

data.title: Cisco Schedules Conference Call for Q3 Fiscal Year 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Cisco, a leading technology company (NASDAQ: CSCO), will be holding a conference call on Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 1:30 PM PT, 4:30 PM ET, to disclose its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, ending on April 25, 2026. This announcement marks a significant update on the company's performance during this period.

data.title: Highland Opportunities and Income Fund Announces the Regular Monthly Distribution
data.description: On May 1, 2026, the Highland Opportunities and Income Fund (NYSE: HFRO) disclosed that it will be issuing a regular monthly distribution of $0.0385 per common stock share. This distribution is set to be paid out on May 29, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the company...

data.title: Forkardt Hardinge Welcomes Ramy Shatoot as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Elmira, New York, on May 1, 2026, Forkardt Hardinge, a top company specializing in workholding solutions and machine accessories, has named Ramy Shatoot as its new Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and board member. Shatoot's appointment marks a significant change in the company's leadership.
PIZZA PIZZA ROYALTY CORP. ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS

data.title: NATURAL GAS SERVICES GROUP, INC. REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL AND OPERATING RESULTS
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Southlake, Texas - Natural Gas Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: NGS), a prominent supplier of natural gas compression equipment, technology, and services to the energy sector, declared its plan to conduct a conference call discussing its first quarter financial results. The conference is scheduled for May 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time (7:30 a.m. Central Time).

data.title: Funko Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In Everett, Washington, Funko, Inc. (Nasdaq: FNKO), a prominent pop culture brand, recently disclosed that on April 29, 2026, the Compensation Committee of their Board of Directors granted inducement awards. These awards include restricted stock units (RSUs) that represent 109,723 shares of Funko’s Class A common stock and were given to nine (9) new employees. The awards were approved under the Funko, Inc. 2024 Inducement Award Plan (Inducement Plan).

data.title: ALGO faces potential drop to $0.09 before rebounding to $0.16. Smart money indicates 65% chance of further decline.
data.description: The technical analysis of ALGO shows a compression at $0.11, indicating a lack of momentum and a potential decline towards the $0.09-0.10 support levels. Smart money positioning forecasts a 65% probability of further decrease in price before a significant recovery.

data.title: JOHN HANCOCK CLOSED-END FUNDS DECLARE MONTHLY DISTRIBUTIONS
data.description: On May 1, 2026, in Boston, the John Hancock closed-end funds have announced their monthly distributions. The Declaration Date is May 1, 2026. The Ex Date is May 11, 2026. The Record Date is May 11, 2026. The Payment Date is May 29, 2026. Details of the distributions per share for the listed funds have also been disclosed with any changes specified.

data.title: Xos to Showcase the Complete Commercial Electrification Ecosystem at ACT Expo 2026, From Vehicles to Mobile Energy Storage
data.description: Xos will be showcasing its complete commercial electrification ecosystem at the upcoming ACT Expo 2026 in Las Vegas from May 4 to 6. Head over to Booth 3216 to learn more about their innovative solutions for the industry.

data.title: Celularity Announces Filing of Form 10-K, Regains Nasdaq Compliance and Highlights Continued Strategic Transformation
data.description: A company has made significant strides in enhancing its focused strategy, bolstering its balance sheet, and positioning itself for long-term growth. The company's efforts have enabled it to strategically realign its operations, leading to a strengthened financial position. These steps have set the stage for sustained growth and improved performance in the future, showcasing the company's commitment to its long-term success.

data.title: XMax Announces AI Model Agreement, Marking Major Milestone for its AI Business
data.description: In Los Angeles on May 01, 2026, XMax Inc. (NASDAQ: XWIN) unveiled that its subsidiary, XMax AI Inc., has inked an API Model Procurement Agreement. This deal grants customers access to XMax's AI models via API services. The Agreement's total value stands at around $4.8 million, to be paid out in monthly installments of $400,000 to XMax AI, Inc. Pricing is subject to adjustment based on the level of AI model services consumption by the customer.

data.title: PyroGenesis Schedules 2026 First Quarter Financial Results and Business Update Conference Call
data.description: PyroGenesis Inc. will be hosting a conference call on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 11:00 AM Eastern Time to discuss its financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2026. The Company (TSX: PYR) (OTCQX: PYRGF) (FRA: 8PY1), known for its expertise in ultra-high temperature processes and engineering innovation, serves as a plasma-based technology provider to heavy industry and defense sectors. The call will also include updates on the Company's recent progress and other significant developments.

data.title: FILE expected to bounce to $1.05 before potential drop to $0.80; bears have 70% chance of decline.
data.description: Shares of FILE have stabilized at $0.93, as the moving averages are aligning for a possible uptrend towards $1.05. However, the bears are currently in charge, indicating a 70% likelihood of a drop to the key support level of $0.80.

data.title: Dianthus Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On May 1, 2026, Dianthus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DNTH), a biotech company in New York and Waltham, awarded equity to six new non-executive employees. The grants, approved by the Compensation Committee, were given as inducements for joining the company, following Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4). Dianthus focuses on developing advanced therapies for severe autoimmune diseases.

data.title: Ultralife Corporation to Report First Quarter Results on May 8, 2026
data.description: Ultralife Corporation, based in Newark, N.Y., is set to release its first quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The report is scheduled to be made public before the market opens on Friday, May 8, 2026. Ultralife Corporation is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ULBI. Investors and stakeholders are keenly anticipating the release to gain insights into the company's financial performance for the beginning of the fiscal year.
